questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) and its adoption as a widely accepted encryption standard in the late 1990s. (15 marks)
What was the main goal of the Bitcoin whitepaper, published by Satoshi Nakamoto in 2008, and how did it differ from earlier cryptocurrency concepts? (15 marks)
Who or what was the primary force behind the development of the Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) protocol, which laid the groundwork for modern web encryption? (5 marks)
